message:
fix(deps): replace hardcoded file:///dp/ paths with GitHub git URLs (#25)

The frankensearch dependency and its patch section used file:///dp/frankensearch,
a path that only exists on the original dev machine and cannot be created on
macOS with SIP. Replaced with https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch
while preserving the pinned rev for reproducibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2506,7 +2506,7 @@ dependencies = [
 [[package]]
 name = "frankensearch"
 version = "0.1.0"
-source = "git+file:///dp/frankensearch?rev=3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da#3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da"
+source = "git+https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch?rev=3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da#3ad4326fd63a3f53d0d90d48f0e5ea1c74c2a4da"
 dependencies = [
  "asupersync",
  "frankensearch-core",
